COURT TRIAL ASSIGNED FROM ROOM 206. WITNESSES AFFFIRMED. MATTER SUBMITTED. COURT FINDS THAT THERE HAS BEEN A SUBSTANTIAL BREACH OF HABITABLY AND AWARDS CONDITIONAL JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT CHARLES PATTERSON AGAINST PLAINTIFF PRAVEN PATEL. CONDITION IS THAT MR. PATTERSON IS TO PAY MR. PATEL $2,025.00 IN RENT BY MAY 1, 2004 AT WHICH POINT MR. PATEL WILL REPAIR HEATING SYSTEM. IF MR. PATTERSON FAILS TO PAY $2,025 BY MAY 1, 2004, JUDGMENT WILL THEN BE FOR MR. PATEL AGAINST MR. PATTERSON. MR. EVJE TO PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT. JUDGE SALDAMANDO, G. PEERLESS, CLK., V. PAPALE, CSR.
